allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "ingest_uipath=%{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-api-key: dhl-uipath-secret-2024" -d '{"type":"note","content":"Verify all parcels are scanned at induction. Open scanner. Scan barcode. Confirm weight. Push to belt."}')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/duplicate-check -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"content":"Verify all parcels are scanned at induction. Open scanner. Scan barcode. Confirm weight. Push to belt."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-api-key: dhl-uipath-secret-2024" -d '{"type":"email","content":"From: ops@dhl.com\\nSubject: New customs hold procedure\\n\\nAll inbound parcels stuck at customs must be flagged in DAC. Open the parcel record. Click Hold. Enter customs reason code. Notify customer within 2 hours. Document in case log."}')

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq 'node' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 ; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq 'node' } | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)
